digest_semantics: SHA-256 over exact canonical resource bytes; this is resource integrity only and not a semantic graph digest.
compatibility: Language-neutral Graph Contract v1 and Node Result v1 data boundaries. Schema presence does not activate Graph execution, runtime state, scheduling, node execution, gates, or authority. Light remains graph-artifact optional.

packaged_mirror.expectation: All resources are byte-identical mirrors of canonical resources in docs/contracts/graph/v1.
